---
title: "Appendix"
format: html
---


## Appendix A: Raw Data File Details

| File | Source | Rows | Columns | Key Variables Used |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `case-and-demographic-characteristics-table-r8-2023-2024.xlsx` | BLS SOII | ~1,200 | 23 | col 2 (NAICS), col 3 (case type), col 4 (total rate), col 10 (fall rate) |
| `fatal.xlsx` | BLS CFOI | ~550 | 9 | col 3 (total fatal), col 7 (fatal falls) |

Both files are public domain U.S. government works available at
[bls.gov](https://www.bls.gov/iif).


## Appendix B: NAICS Sector Codes Used

| Sector | NAICS Code | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Manufacturing | 31–33 | All manufacturing industries combined |
| Finance & Insurance | 52 | Banks, insurers, investment firms |
| Professional Services | 54 | Legal, accounting, engineering, consulting |

These are the broadest-level NAICS codes available in the R8 table, ensuring
sector-wide averages rather than sub-industry figures.



## Appendix C: Suppressed Values


:::
